title: No-Profit Donation centers Best Practices using Monday.com
excerpt: I am setting up Monday.com for a non-profit donation center that collects then provides free of charge school supplies to teachers and students. I would be interested in learning some from best practices of specific appr…

posts.author: MA-Dickel (Michael Dickel)
posts.cookedHtml: I am setting up Monday.com for a non-profit donation center that collects then provides free of charge school supplies to teachers and students. I would be interested in learning some from best practices of specific approaches to e.g . Donation Collection, Sorting, Disposition and warehouse management. If anyone has any Monday.com workflows, Board set-ups etc. that you might share, I would be grateful – than also share any interesting approaches I devise. thank you - Michael
